Off Calendar Jun-10-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances via Zoom Conference
CARLOS JATO, Esq., 415.771.6174 Fax: 415.474.3748 cgjato@jato-law.com Attorney for Plaintiffs VICTOR ORLANDO CELIS CANUL, JOSE WILBERT CUA, et al
DOUGLAS J. MELTON, Esq., LONG & LEVIT LLP (415) 397-2222 dmelton@longlevit.com Attorneys for Defendants RICHARD DINGMAN, PAUL LANGLEY and LANGLEY ENTERPRISES

Hearing is held. Not ARGUED.The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

CONFIRMATION HEARING RE: DISTRICUTION OF THE PAGA SETTLEMENT FUNDS is granted.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the Court's ruling in compliance with CRC 3.1312.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (302/RBU)

Notice Of Motion And To Approve The Paga Settlement; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities; Proof Of Service
Off Calendar Feb-02-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Hearing Re: PLAINTIFF VICTOR CELIS CANUL, JOSE CUA, ALFREDO NIS SAENZ, JOSE CHAN, MARCOS SIERRA, WILBERTH INTERIAN, PEDRO MAY, ARTURO ACEVEDO, JAVIER VALLE, LUIS GALAVIZ ORTEGA's Motion To Approve The PAGA Settlement.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Plaintiffs' unopposed "motion to approve the PAGA settlement" is granted.

The Court sets a confirmation hearing for June 10, 2024 at 9:30 a.m. in Dept. 302 to confirm distribution of the PAGA settlement funds.

Order signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (302/RBU)
